"It's best to help others as much as possible. Those small
acts of kindness will eventually come back to you."
"It's probably better to do it even if you think it's a
hassle. Besides, helping people can make you feel good."
"It would be good to help someone if they're in trouble. You
can somehow tell who's in trouble just by their appearance."
